parsed_output.justification: Zack claims he started as the Insomniac and, upon checking his card at the end of the night, discovered he was the Drunk. According to the game rules, the Drunk always swaps their card with one from the center, meaning it is logically impossible for any player to end the night as the Drunk (unless they were the Doppelganger, but even then, the copied Drunk role would have swapped the card away). This blatant inconsistency suggests Zack is lying about his role, making him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.

This blatant inconsistency suggests Zack is lying about his role, making him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
